name: candidate-parks-chicago
description: Chicago-based query should suggest nearby parks from candidate list

messages.content: I live in Chicago and want to visit a national park this summer. What do you recommend?

mustInclude.pattern: Indiana Dunes|Sleeping Bear|Pictured Rocks|Cuyahoga|Apostle Islands|Isle Royale|Voyageurs
mustInclude.description: Suggests at least one park near Chicago
